title: Project Mha
description: Adds quirks from my hero academia to minecraft!
body:
# Important
### Dependencies
- Origins Mod
- Origins Extra Keybinds
- Pehkui
### Incompatible With
- Any mod/datapack that adds more origins
- Any mod/datapack that adds extra origin layers
### Beta Release
- This is only a beta release! for sneak peaks, bug reports and suggestions join our discord!

# Powers
There are currently only 8 powers in the game but more will be added with updates!
- Engine
- Blackwhip
- Fa jin
- Danger Sense
- Gearshift
- Float
- Smokescreen
- OFA (All Might) Current unobtainable and is not finished!

# Config

### Editing Config
- To edit config you can use this command: /scoreboard players set *CONFIG_NAME_HERE Mha.CONFIG 0
- You can replace the CONFIG_NAME_HERE with any config name and set it to either 0 or 1
0 Means that this config is disabled and 1 means that this config is enabled

### All Config Options
- *LANDMINE_DESTRUCTION : If landmines should destroy blocks
- *STRESS_BURDEN_DESTRUCTION : If stress burden should destroy blocks
